meta.siteDescription: Documentation for Sirr — the ephemeral secret vault built for the AI era.

/.title: Sirr Documentation
/.description: Documentation for Sirr — the ephemeral secret vault built for the AI era. Push secrets with TTL and read limits.

/quickstart.title: Quickstart
/quickstart.description: Get started with Sirr in minutes. Install, configure, and push your first ephemeral secret.

/architecture.title: Architecture
/architecture.description: How Sirr encrypts, stores, and expires secrets using ChaCha20Poly1305, Argon2id, and redb.

/configuration.title: Configuration
/configuration.description: All environment variables and configuration options for the Sirr server and CLI clients.

/authentication.title: Authentication
/authentication.description: How to authenticate with the Sirr API using bearer tokens.

/errors.title: Errors
/errors.description: HTTP status codes, error response format, and troubleshooting for the Sirr API.

/sdks.title: SDKs
/sdks.description: Official Sirr client libraries for Node.js, Python, and .NET.

/api-reference.title: API Reference
/api-reference.description: Complete HTTP API reference for all 6 Sirr server endpoints.

/deployment.title: Deployment
/deployment.description: Deploy Sirr with Docker, Homebrew, binary download, or build from source.

/self-hosting.title: Self-Hosting
/self-hosting.description: Production deployment guide with reverse proxy, TLS, backups, and monitoring.

/security.title: Security
/security.description: Sirr's threat model, encryption details, and zero-trust design principles.

/vault-encryption.title: Vault Encryption
/vault-encryption.description: Two-tier encryption-at-rest architecture: AES-256-GCM server-side encryption, client-side encryption, key delivery, rotation, and backups.

/licensing.title: Licensing
/licensing.description: BSL 1.1 license details, free tier limits, and commercial licensing for Sirr.

/cli.title: CLI Reference
/cli.description: Complete reference for all 9 Sirr CLI commands with examples.

/mcp.title: MCP Server
/mcp.description: Set up the Sirr MCP server for Claude Code AI integration.

/ai-workflows.title: AI Workflows
/ai-workflows.description: Patterns for using Sirr with AI agents, CI/CD pipelines, and team workflows.

home.heroLead: The secret manager built for the AI era. Every secret expires. By design. Push secrets with TTL and read limits — once conditions are met, the secret is gone.
home.gettingStartedLead: Install Sirr as a single binary or Docker container, configure your master key, and start pushing ephemeral secrets in minutes.
